title: Dehra Temple
tagline: Dehra Temple — spiritual town of Haryana

overview.short: Dehra Temple, state protected monument and a Hindu-Jain temple in Aravalli foothills forest, at Bhond village off the NH-248A and Delhi–Mumbai Expressway, 2 km west of Ferozepur Jh
overview.description: Dehra Temple, state protected monument and a Hindu-Jain temple in Aravalli foothills forest, at Bhond village off the NH-248A and Delhi–Mumbai Expressway, 2 km west of Ferozepur Jhirka in Nuh district of Haryana state in India. The temple lies 100 km south of IGI Delhi Airport and 200 km north of Jaipur Airport on Delhi-Jaipur section of Golden Triangle (Delhi-Jaipur-Agra tourist circuit).

topPlaces.name: Ferozepur Jhirka
topPlaces.description: Ferozepur Jhirka, occasionally called Jhirka, is a town and historical settlement in the Ferozepur Jhirka, a sub-division of the Nuh district in the Indian state of Haryana. Sh Rajkumar Gupta won the presidential election of Bar Association Ferozepur Jhirka held on Feb 28, 2025 and serving as PRESIDENT of Bar Association.

topPlaces.name: Jhirkeshwar mahadev
topPlaces.description: Jhirkeshwar Mahadev, also known as Jhir Mandir, is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva and located in Ferozepur Jhirka, Haryana, India. This cave temple is located at foothills of Aravalli Range.

items.note: Ferozepur Jhirka, occasionally called Jhirka, is a town and historical settlement in the Ferozepur Jhirka, a sub-division of the Nuh district in the Indian state of Haryana. Sh Rajkumar Gupta won the presidential election of Bar Association Ferozepur Jhirka held on Feb 28, 2025 and serving as PRESIDENT of Bar Association.

Jhirkeshwar Mahadev, also known as Jhir Mandir, is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva and located in Ferozepur Jhirka, Haryana, India. This cave temple is located at foothills of Aravalli Range.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Dehra Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Dehra Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Dehra Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Indira Gandhi International Airport, Delhi (88 km) and the nearest railway station is New Delhi Railway Station (100 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Dehra Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Dehra Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Dehra Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Dehra Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Dehra Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ferozepur Jhirka, Jhirkeshwar mahadev.
